prompt_text:
### Demographics: 66-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 22 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
Heart failure: HFmrEF (NYHA Class III)
ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease
MASH
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF: HFmrEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease; MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger brother)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 10 years ago; 10 cigarettes/day for 15 years; ~7.5 pack-years); No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 50.1 kg; Height 159.8 cm; BMI 19.6 kg/m²; Blood pressure 136/88 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.7%; 9 months ago 8.3%; 6 months ago 7.8%; 3 months ago 7.3%; current 6.0%), FPG (12 months ago 212mg/dL; 9 months ago 184mg/dL; 6 months ago 211mg/dL; 3 months ago 174mg/dL; current 139mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 51.2kg; 9 months ago 49.2kg; 6 months ago 49.1kg; 3 months ago 45.9kg; current 50.1kg), Height (12 months ago 159.8cm; 9 months ago 159.8cm; 6 months ago 159.8cm; 3 months ago 159.8cm; current 159.8cm), BMI (12 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 18.0kg/m²; current 19.6kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 138mmHg; 9 months ago 142mmHg; 6 months ago 141mmHg; 3 months ago 140mmHg; current 136mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 87mmHg; 9 months ago 88mmHg; 6 months ago 86mmHg; 3 months ago 90mmHg; current 88mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 99U/L; 9 months ago 89U/L; 6 months ago 92U/L; 3 months ago 79U/L; current 101U/L), AST (12 months ago 78U/L; 9 months ago 84U/L; 6 months ago 71U/L; 3 months ago 66U/L; current 86U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.3mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.3mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.2mg/dL; current 1.3mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 36mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 31mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 32mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 33mL/min/1.73m²; current 32mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 177mg/g; 9 months ago 139mg/g; 6 months ago 178mg/g; 3 months ago 166mg/g; current 118mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 84mg/dL; 9 months ago 90mg/dL; 6 months ago 84mg/dL; 3 months ago 88mg/dL; current 86mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 44mg/dL; 9 months ago 45mg/dL; 6 months ago 48mg/dL; 3 months ago 48mg/dL; current 46mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 169mg/dL; 9 months ago 168mg/dL; 6 months ago 170mg/dL; 3 months ago 173mg/dL; current 161mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 10.0g/dL; 9 months ago 10.3g/dL; 6 months ago 9.6g/dL; 3 months ago 10.2g/dL; current 9.7g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 2.00 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
